title: Create # of Subitems based on Data Input in Board Column

posts.author: patrickn (Patrick Nissim)
posts.cookedHtml:
We currently have submissions from a typeform that get plugged into a monday.com board.

They are submitted as a single board item, but sometimes the projects have multiple deliverables.

Example:
User submits project which creates item
Column (# of Deliverables) shows how many deliverables there are.

I would like the # of subitems to match the # in the deliverables column.

Lastly would love for them to be named (i.e. [Project Name] 1, [Project Name] 2…)

Is this possible currently or would this need to be added?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@patrickn

You would need a custom solution to do that. I’m partial to Make for these kinds of tasks. This would be a good first project for you if you are interested in creating it yourself.

Jim - The Monday Man
What is Make & How can it help you with monday?
We Create Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday

posts.author: patrickn (Patrick Nissim)
posts.cookedHtml: Going to give it a shot. Thanks!
